## 💬 Quick Q&A

**Who are you?**
> A passionate developer and creator — always exploring new tech and building things that matter.

**What do you love doing?**
> Coding, building GitHub projects, and creating advanced bots and digital tools.

**What is your biggest strength?**
> My honesty and unwavering belief in Allah.

**What are you currently working on?**
> WhatsApp bots, Shopify stores, Facebook & TikTok/YouTube monetization, website ad marketing.

**What is your future goal?**
> No big ambitions — just a simple, peaceful life.
